info.name: Maxvision Display Inc. API
info.description:
Complete API documentation for Maxvision Display Inc. - LED Display Solutions

Base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8000/api

All responses follow this structure:
- Success: Returns data directly or wrapped in 'data' object
- Error: Returns { "message": "Error description" }

item.name: Products

query.description: Filter by category: outdoor, indoor, transparent, posters, controllers

request.description:
Get paginated list of active products with optional filtering.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "ptf-p3",
      "name": "PTF-P3 Transparent LED Display",
      "series": "PTF",
      "category": "transparent",
      "image": "http://127.0.0.1:8000/storage/products/ptf-p3.jpg",
      "environment": "indoor",
      "brightness": 4500,
      "brightnessRange": "4000-5000 nits",
      "pixelPitch": 3.0,
      "pixelPitchLabel": "P3",
      "cabinetSize": "1000x500mm",
      "advantage": "High Transparency Rate",
      "price": "Contact for Quote"
    }
  ],
  "links": { "first": "...", "last": "...", "prev": null, "next": "..." },
  "meta": { "current_page": 1, "from": 1, "last_page": 3, "per_page": 12, "to": 12, "total": 30 }
}
```

Get a single product with full details including features, applications, and specifications.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "ptf-p3",
    "name": "PTF-P3 Transparent LED Display",
    "series": "PTF",
    "category": "transparent",
    "slug": "ptf-p3",
    "description": "High-performance transparent LED display...",
    "image": "http://127.0.0.1:8000/storage/products/ptf-p3.jpg",
    "gallery": ["image1.jpg", "image2.jpg"],
    "environment": "indoor",
    "brightness": 4500,
    "brightnessRange": "4000-5000 nits",
    "pixelPitch": 3.0,
    "pixelPitchLabel": "P3",
    "cabinetSize": "1000x500mm",
    "viewCount": 150,
    "features": [
      { "icon": "eye", "title": "High Transparency", "description": "Up to 80% transparency rate" }
    ],
    "applications": ["Retail Windows", "Showrooms", "Museums"],
    "specifications": [
      { "label": "Pixel Pitch", "value": "3mm" },
      { "label": "Brightness", "value": "4000-5000 nits" }
    ],
    "price": "Contact for Quote"
  }
}
```

item.name: Case Studies

request.description:


Get detailed case study with metrics, specs, and gallery.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "nike-flagship",
    "title": "Nike Flagship Store NYC",
    "client": "Nike",
    "industry": "retail",
    "location": "New York, USA",
    "description": "Immersive retail experience...",
    "challenge": "Create an immersive experience...",
    "solution": "Installed 50sqm of PTF-P3...",
    "results": "40% increase in foot traffic...",
    "gallery": ["img1.jpg", "img2.jpg"],
    "metrics": [
      { "label": "Display Size", "value": "50 sqm" },
      { "label": "Foot Traffic Increase", "value": "40%" }
    ],
    "specs": [
      { "label": "Product Used", "value": "PTF-P3" },
      { "label": "Installation Time", "value": "2 weeks" }
    ],
    "products": ["ptf-p3"],
    "completionDate": "2024-06-15"
  }
}
```

request.description:
Submit a contact/quote request. Rate limited to prevent spam.

**Required Fields:**
- `first_name` (string, max: 50)
- `last_name` (string, max: 50)
- `email` (valid email, max: 255)
- `project_type` (one of: Outdoor Advertising, Indoor LED Wall, Transparent Display, LED Poster / Signage, Architectural Facade, Retail Storefront, Corporate / Control Room, Events & Stages, Other)
- `timeline` (one of: Immediate (< 1 month), 1 – 3 months, 3 – 6 months, 6 – 12 months, Planning / Research phase)
- `size_requirements` (string, max: 500)
- `budget_range` (string, max: 100)

**Optional Fields:**
- `phone` (string, max: 30)
- `company` (string, max: 100)
- `message` (string, max: 2000)

**Success Response (201):**
```json
{
  "message": "Quote request submitted successfully.",
  "submission_id": 123
}
```

**Error Response (422):**
```json
{
  "message": "The given data was invalid.",
  "errors": {
    "email": ["Please provide a valid email address."]
  }
}
```

```json
    "typeLabel": "Full-time",
```

```json
    "responsibilities": ["Lead development projects", "Mentor junior developers"],
    "requirements": ["5+ years experience", "Strong in React/Laravel"],
    "benefits": ["Competitive salary", "Remote work options"],
    "salaryRange": "$120,000 - $150,000",
    "postedAt": "2026-02-15",
    "applicationDeadline": "2026-03-15",
    "isRemote": true,
    "isUrgent": false,
    "contactEmail": "careers@maxvisiondisplay.com"
  }
}
```

formdata.value: I am excited to apply for this position...

formdata.description: Required (unless linkedin_url provided) - PDF, DOC, DOCX, max 10MB
Set to true for general application (no specific job)

request.description:
Submit a job application. Use multipart/form-data for file upload.

**Required Fields:**
- `first_name` (string, max: 100)
- `last_name` (string, max: 100)
- `email` (valid email, max: 255)
- `resume` OR `linkedin_url` (at least one required)

**Optional Fields:**
- `job_id` (string, existing job slug) - omit for general applications
- `phone` (string, max: 50)
- `cover_letter` (string, max: 5000)
- `linkedin_url` (valid URL, max: 500)
- `portfolio_url` (valid URL, max: 500)
- `is_general` (boolean) - set true for general resume submission

**File Requirements:**
- `resume`: PDF, DOC, or DOCX format
- Maximum file size: 10MB

**Success Response (201):**
```json
{
  "message": "Application submitted successfully!",
  "application_id": 45
}
```

**Validation Error (422):**
```json
{
  "message": "The given data was invalid.",
  "errors": {
    "resume": ["Please upload a resume or provide your LinkedIn URL."],
    "email": ["The email has already been taken."]
  }
}
```

Get the authenticated user (requires Sanctum token).

**Headers:**
- Authorization: Bearer {token}

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "Admin User",
  "email": "admin@maxvisiondisplay.com",
  "email_verified_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z",
  "created_at": "2026-01-01T00:00:00.000000Z"
}
```
